notes: AI egress proxy under src/proxy/ is the active P2 workstream (docs: docs/proxy/security-design.md).
Security-auditor pass produced 9-item backlog (Appendix C). Items C-1 through C-4 and C-7 through C-9 must close before P2 exits review.

proxy_file_routing.description: Per-file agent delegation + legal/compliance constraints for docs/proxy and src/proxy changes. Read this when touching any listed path BEFORE writing code.

constraints: NĐ 13/2023 Điều 27 khoản 1 điểm đ requires tamper-evidence for processing records. fsync is durability only, not integrity.
Planned hardening: HMAC chain h_n = HMAC-SHA256(K, h_{n-1} || canonical_json(event_n)) + daily WORM anchor. Spec in docs/proxy/security-design.md Appendix C-1.
Audit log MUST emit sha256(value)[:8], never plaintext — Appendix C-8 side-channel requirement.
Data-subject rights (NĐ 13/2023 Điều 14–17): right-to-access + right-to-erasure must map to vault ops. 72h response SLA per Điều 14 khoản 4. See Appendix C-7.
purgeExpired() exists but is NOT wired to setInterval in startProxy — B2 backlog item.
Do NOT hardcode TTL — always read from config.vault.ttlSeconds.
Thông tư 59/2021/TT-BCA does NOT publish a CCCD check-digit algorithm. Any 'Luhn' or 'checksum' framing for CCCD is factually wrong.
Agreed CCCD validator = province-code allowlist (63 codes) + gender-century digit + year plausibility + contextual trigger regex. See Appendix C-5.
Upstream-response DLP pass is missing (Appendix C-8). Add scrubber before forwarding SSE chunks to client for SECRET.*, CCCD, BANK_ACCOUNT classifiers.
Scheme MUST be FF3-1 per NIST SP 800-38G Rev.1 (2019). NOT FF1. NEVER original FF3 (withdrawn).
Block cipher = AES-256. Minimum domain size = 10^6. Excludes PINs, 6-digit OTPs, 3-digit province codes.
CCCD is NOT in FPE scope (tokenised instead) — see Appendix C-2 spec.
CISO sign-off required before any code ships (Appendix C-3).
jti blacklist in Redis (cross-instance replay defense). POST /admin/bypass/revoke endpoint. RS256 rotated quarterly via JWKS with 7-day overlap.
Approval portal MFA must be WebAuthn/FIDO2 preferred; OIDC-MFA acceptable. Password + TOTP NOT sufficient.
NEVER-for-SECRET MUST be server-enforced by re-running DLP after bypass resolution. Advisory-only is non-compliant.
HTTPS-only for upstream forward (already enforced in ab9ac90).
HITL permissions + backpressure hardening already applied (ab9ac90). Do not weaken.
Add §2 code cross-check annotations (Appendix C-9) when modifying inbound/outbound hook points — map each §2 claim in docs to the code line.
SSE rolling-buffer split-secret defense already applied (ab9ac90). Chunk boundaries must not bypass DLP.
Zod validation on upstream responses (already present) — do not bypass on 'fast path'.
Dictionary hot-reload via chokidar file watcher is B5 backlog (behind OMC_PROXY_DICT_WATCH=1).
Aho-Corasick lookup is sub-millisecond — do not optimise prematurely.
Parse or sqlify failure = silent pass-through. NEVER throw past applyPolicy.
includeColumns opt-in only until Appendix C-6 A/B benchmark completes.
Column-qualifier tokenisation on column_ref MUST always run (regression guard test exists) — leaving it gated by includeColumns leaked users.id in JOIN ON-clauses.
B7 in-progress: behind OMC_PROXY_AST_DLP=1.
Parse failure MUST fall back to pass-through (same contract as sql-lane.ts).
p95 latency budget for code path ≤130 ms per design doc §6. Add a perf smoke test.
All NĐ 13/2023 citations MUST name the specific Điều (article). Generic 'NĐ 13/2023' references are non-compliant per Appendix C audit.
Never reintroduce 'Luhn-like checksum' for CCCD — no such algorithm exists in Thông tư 59/2021.
Admission gate for VN NER lane: precision ≥ 0.85, recall ≥ 0.70 on labelled dev-prompt test set (Appendix C-4).
Underthesea F1 on VLSP 2016/2018 news corpora does NOT substitute for dev-context benchmark.
